task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Tor Project's v3 onion service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the Tor Project website, with a .onion address visible in the URL bar.

task_completion.description: Verify a bookmark was created with the exact title 'Tor Project Onion'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark menu, sidebar, or bookmark creation popup shows a saved bookmark titled exactly 'Tor Project Onion' pointing to the onion site.

task_completion.description: Verify the text file onion_location_audit.txt is created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows the file named 'onion_location_audit.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the audit file contains the required 'Target Site' and 'Header Detected' lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the exact lines 'Target Site: https://www.torproject.org/' and 'Header Detected: Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the audit file contains the correct 'Onion-Location Value'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'Onion-Location Value: ' followed by a valid 56-character v3 onion URL (e.g., starting with http:// or https:// and ending in .onion).

integrity.description: Ensure the bookmark was created using a real web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the bookmark being created or existing within a genuine web browser interface, rather than being injected via terminal commands or scripts into a database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually inspected the HTTP headers to find the Onion-Location value.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using browser developer tools (Network tab), a terminal with a curl command (e.g., curl -I), or a similar method to genuinely inspect the headers of https://www.torproject.org/.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent documented the real onion address and did not hallucinate a fake one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The onion address written in the text file must match the one discovered in the HTTP headers or the one navigated to in the browser URL bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Site: https://www.torproject.org/. Expected File: /home/ga/Documents/onion_location_audit.txt. Expected Bookmark Title: 'Tor Project Onion'. The valid Onion-Location value must be a 56-character v3 onion address matching the regex `https?://[a-z2-7]{56}\.onion` (e.g., http://2gzyxa5ihm7nsggfxnu52rck2vv4rvmdlkiu3zzui5du4xyclen53wid.onion/index.html).
